topic: A mug with my name appears in the office break room each morning, still warm.
title: The Warm Mug With My Name Each Morning | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: A mug with my name appears in the break room each morning, still warm.
scenes.image_prompt: A single mug on a break room counter under dim light, faint steam rising, empty room behind, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I am always the first one into the office.
scenes.image_prompt: An empty office break room before dawn, dark counters, one window letting in grey light, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I unlock the door, flip the lights, start the coffee.
scenes.image_prompt: A hand on a light switch in a dark break room, coffee machine in shadow, faint glow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One morning a mug sat out, full, my name on the side.
scenes.image_prompt: Close still of a ceramic mug with a name printed on it, dark coffee inside, dim counter light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I touched it. Warm. Freshly poured. I was alone.
scenes.image_prompt: A hand near a steaming mug on a counter, faint steam curling, deep shadow around, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It happened again the next day. And the day after that.
scenes.image_prompt: A warm mug on the same counter spot, morning light faint through blinds, empty room, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I came in earlier, before the building even unlocked.
scenes.image_prompt: An office building exterior in pre-dawn dark, one entrance dimly lit, empty parking lot, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The mug was already waiting. Steam still curling off it.
scenes.image_prompt: A steaming mug alone on a dark counter, faint coffee aroma haze, single dim bulb above, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I checked the cameras. They showed me, already there, pouring it.
scenes.image_prompt: Grainy security camera still of a break room, a faint figure at the counter, timestamp glow, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: But I had not arrived yet when the footage was filmed.
scenes.image_prompt: A dark break room with a faceless silhouette standing at the counter holding a mug, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I poured it out. Next morning, two warm mugs waited.
scenes.image_prompt: Two steaming mugs side by side on a dim counter, both with printed names, faint steam, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: There are five now. One for each year I have worked here.
scenes.image_prompt: A row of five warm mugs lined on a break room counter, faint steam, grey dawn light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing
